typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		RECID as long,
		RECVERSION as integer,
		PARTITION as long,
		DATAAREAID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED; SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY LOW;  SELECT [RECID], [RECVERSION], [PARTITION], [DATAAREAID] FROM [dbo].[INVENTTRANS] WITH (NOLOCK);',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource	source(output(
		RECID as long,
		RECVERSION as integer,
		PARTITION as long,
		DATAAREAID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED; SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY LOW;  SELECT [RECID], [RECVERSION], [PARTITION], [DATAAREAID] FROM [ax].[INVENTTRANS] WITH (NOLOCK);',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource1	source(output(
		RECID as long,
		RECVERSION as integer,
		PARTITION as long,
		DATAAREAID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT RECID, RECVERSION, PARTITION, DATAAREAID FROM ax.INVENTTRANS WITH (NOLOCK);',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupLKPTABLE	source(output(
		RECID as long,
		RECVERSION as integer,
		PARTITION as long,
		DATAAREAID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT RECID, RECVERSION, PARTITION, DATAAREAID FROM dbo.INVENTTRANS WITH (NOLOCK);',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Lookup1LKPTABLE
OLEDBSource,LookupLKPTABLE lookup(OLEDBSource@RECID == LookupLKPTABLE@RECID && OLEDBSource@DATAAREAID == LookupLKPTABLE@DATAAREAID && OLEDBSource@PARTITION == LookupLKPTABLE@PARTITION && OLEDBSource@RECVERSION == LookupLKPTABLE@RECVERSION,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookup
OLEDBSource1,Lookup1LKPTABLE lookup(OLEDBSource1@RECID == Lookup1LKPTABLE@RECID && OLEDBSource1@DATAAREAID == Lookup1LKPTABLE@DATAAREAID && OLEDBSource1@PARTITION == Lookup1LKPTABLE@PARTITION && OLEDBSource1@RECVERSION == Lookup1LKPTABLE@RECVERSION,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookup1
Lookup select(mapColumn(
		RECID = OLEDBSource@RECID,
		RECVERSION = OLEDBSource@RECVERSION,
		PARTITION = OLEDBSource@PARTITION,
		DATAAREAID = OLEDBSource@DATAAREAID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LookupSelect
Lookup1 select(mapColumn(
		RECID = OLEDBSource1@RECID,
		RECVERSION = OLEDBSource1@RECVERSION,
		PARTITION = OLEDBSource1@PARTITION,
		DATAAREAID = OLEDBSource1@DATAAREAID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> Lookup1Select
LookupSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
Lookup1Select split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> Lookup1IsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupIsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
		RECID as long,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		PARTITION as long,
		RECVERSION as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		RECID,
		DATAAREAID,
		PARTITION,
		RECVERSION)) ~> NoMatch
Lookup1IsMatch@NotMatch sink(input(
		RECID as long,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		PARTITION as long,
		RECVERSION as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		RECID,
		DATAAREAID,
		PARTITION,
		RECVERSION)) ~> NoMatch1
